name: Public API Explorer - Category Index
description: Master index for LLMs to navigate API categories and find relevant endpoints

navigation_guide.how_to_use: Based on the user's request, identify the category that best matches their needs, then reference the corresponding JSON file for detailed API information
navigation_guide.category_selection: Match keywords in user queries to the 'keywords' field in each category below

categories.name: AI & NLP
categories.description: Translation, sentiment analysis, QR codes, and AI-related utilities
categories.use_when: User needs text translation, sentiment analysis, QR code generation, or random test data
sample_questions: Analyze the sentiment of this message
Create random user data for testing

categories.name: Cryptocurrency & Finance
categories.description: Cryptocurrency prices, market data, and financial information
categories.use_when: User needs cryptocurrency prices, market data, or blockchain information
sample_questions: What's the current price of Bitcoin?

categories.name: Currency Exchange
categories.description: Currency exchange rates and conversion
categories.use_when: User needs currency exchange rates or wants to convert between currencies
sample_questions: What's the exchange rate for USD to EUR?
What's the forex rate for GBP?

categories.name: E-commerce & Products
categories.description: Product catalogs, categories, and e-commerce data
categories.use_when: User needs product information, categories, or e-commerce data
sample_questions: List all products in a category

categories.name: Entertainment
categories.description: Movies, TV shows, games, jokes, and entertainment content
categories.use_when: User wants entertainment content, movie info, jokes, or games

categories.name: Food & Recipes
categories.description: Recipes, ingredients, nutrition, and food data
categories.use_when: User needs recipes, food information, or nutritional data
sample_questions: What can I cook with these ingredients?

categories.name: Health & Fitness
categories.description: Health data, fitness information, and medical resources
categories.use_when: User needs health or fitness related information

categories.name: Images & Photos
categories.description: Image search, photos, and visual content - Includes both free and auth APIs
categories.use_when: User needs to search for or retrieve images and photos (free and auth options available)
sample_questions: Find stock photos with API key

categories.name: Videos & Media
categories.description: Video search, clips, and media content - Includes both free and auth APIs
categories.use_when: User needs to search for or retrieve videos and media content (free and auth options available)

categories.name: Jobs & Career
categories.description: Job search, career opportunities, and employment data
categories.use_when: User is looking for jobs or career information

categories.name: Knowledge & Education
categories.description: Dictionary, books, Wikipedia, and educational resources
categories.use_when: User needs definitions, book information, or Wikipedia articles
sample_questions: Find book by title or author

categories.name: Location & Geocoding
categories.description: Geocoding, addresses, and location-based services
categories.use_when: User needs to geocode addresses or get location information

categories.name: News & Media
categories.description: News articles, headlines, and current events
categories.use_when: User wants news articles or current events

categories.name: Security & Threat Intelligence
categories.description: Cybersecurity data, vulnerability information, and threat intelligence
categories.use_when: User needs security or vulnerability information

categories.name: Science & Space
categories.description: Space exploration, NASA data, ISS tracking, and scientific information
categories.use_when: User needs space data, scientific information, or satellite tracking
sample_questions: Where is the ISS right now?
Who is on the space station?

categories.name: Sports & Athletics
categories.description: Sports scores, statistics, and athletic information
categories.use_when: User wants sports scores or statistics

categories.name: Stocks & Markets
categories.description: Stock market data, quotes, and financial markets
categories.use_when: User needs stock market data or quotes

categories.name: Travel & Tourism
categories.description: Travel information, tourism, and location guides
categories.use_when: User needs travel or tourism information

categories.name: Weather
categories.description: Weather forecasts, current conditions, and alerts
categories.use_when: User needs weather information or forecasts

categories.name: Utilities
categories.description: Utility APIs: hashing, encoding, validation, and helper tools
categories.use_when: User needs utility functions or helper tools

for_llms: 1. Analyze the user's request to identify keywords and intent
2. Match keywords to the 'keywords' array in each category above
3. Select the most relevant category based on keyword matching
4. Load the corresponding JSON file (e.g., 'ai.json' for AI category)
5. Find the appropriate endpoint within that category's APIs
6. Use the direct_url to call the real API directly
7. Return the results to the user

example_workflow.user_request: What's the weather in New York?
